productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Cream Shirt
description: Composition Cream self striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, pocket on the left chest, and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Crafted from rich ceremonial fabric to blend perfectly the best of Indian tradition and Western silhouettes, this shirt from the Weddings collection of peter england is all set to help you make that grand entry in style. Team it with well fitting chinos, a matching blazer and ethno-western footwear. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
